UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.title: sickly child
UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a sickly child. [PAWN_pronoun] spent days on end recuperating in the hospital, where [PAWN_pronoun] befriended all the nurses and picked up some basic medical training.

UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.title: gourmand
UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] always had a love for food. [PAWN_pronoun] spent [PAWN_possessive] spare time hanging around the kitchen, pilfering snacks and learning the secrets of cooking a good meal.

UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.title: brawler
UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was quick to anger and loved getting up close and personal, resolving arguments with [PAWN_possessive] fists. [PAWN_pronoun] didn't make many friends, but [PAWN_pronoun] did get a lot of practice patching up wounds.

UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.title: mad prodigy
UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was an unstable prodigy. He applied his genius to the arts, and frequently broke under the pressure of his chaotic mind.

UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.title: bully
UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] enjoyed hurting people, often picking on the smaller children. [PAWN_pronoun] loved utterly crushing [PAWN_possessive] unfortunate targets.
